title: Remanentia Canonical Memory-Write Schema
description: The structural contract every record written to fleet memory must satisfy (SNN stimuli, SYNAPSE findings/decisions, recall events). Enforced by Remanentia's write_discipline gate. Required fields are caught when absent, not silently defaulted.

content.description: The memory text. Real information, not a placeholder. Canonical key; do not use text/statement/summary/event.

project.description: Originating project/repo as an UPPERCASE slug, e.g. SCPN-QUANTUM-CONTROL.

actor.description: Producing agent ROLE. Never a random worker/process id; collapse worker-7f3a to its role.

timestamp.description: When the event happened. The single biggest current gap in fleet writes; always include it.

entities.description: Recommended. Salient entities for cross-session linking and entity-anchored retrieval.

source_ref.description: Recommended. Provenance: commit SHA, file path, or URL.
